title: agent lab/mar29
author: BenedictChannn
body:
- **chore(general): add gitignore and cursor command/rule**
- **Add agent_lab harness for autonomous training experiments**
- **agent_lab E2: default NUM_KV_HEADS=2 (better final_int8_ttt_lora vs 4)**
- **agent_lab E3: default TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=262144 (more steps/wall, better ttt val_bpb)**
- **agent_lab E4: default MATRIX_LR=0.06 (improved final_int8_ttt_lora)**
- **docs: agent_lab session log 2026-03-28 and README runtime note**
- **feat(agent-lab): experiments registry, commit conventions, and cursor skill**
- **feat(agent-lab): run_exp.sh, skill merge, interaction + journal guidance**
- **docs(agent-lab): researcher mindset section in skill**
- **docs(agent-lab): codify autonomous research doctrine**
- **docs(agent-lab): log mar29 baseline reproduction**
- **feat(agent-lab): test 10-layer baseline**
- **docs(agent-lab): log depth-only result**
- **feat(agent-lab): test 10 layers with smaller batch**
- **docs(agent-lab): log depth-plus-step-recovery win**
- **feat(agent-lab): test 10 layers with 131k batch**
- **docs(agent-lab): log 131k frontier result**
- **feat(agent-lab): test 10 layers with kv1 attention**
- **docs(agent-lab): add stateful research memory surfaces**
- **feat(agent-lab): add architecture audit dashboard**
- **docs(agent-lab): plan mlp-vs-depth tranche**
- **docs(agent-lab): reformat tranche map**
- **docs(agent-lab): drop redundant mlp replay**
- **docs(agent-lab): log fixed-depth mlp1 result**
- **docs(agent-lab): log fixed-depth mlp3 result**
- **docs(agent-lab): log deeper-thinner result**
- **docs(agent-lab): log shallower-wider near-miss**
- **docs(agent-lab): log width step-recovery winner**
- **docs(agent-lab): plan width recovery tranches**
- **docs(agent-lab): log dim480 size recovery test**
- **docs(agent-lab): log AL-20260329-012 frontier win**
- **docs(agent-lab): log AL-20260329-013 dim448 result**
- **docs(agent-lab): log AL-20260329-014 layer-trim result**

- **docs(agent-lab): close tranche F**
